name: game-omni
description: Game Omni v1.6 (newest/default) — prompt -> verified, playable Phaser 2D web game in one pass. v1.6 dependency-separated producing tier: Gameplay hardens the gameplay-only blueprint + seeds per-node contracts; Shell ∥ Guidance chrome producers run in parallel and fold their sections in; then the build tier. Nodes coordinate through on-disk artifacts; each loads an evidence-grounded skill. Pi-portable.
